---
title: "GitHub reproducible workbook"
author: "YU-LIN CHUNG, 35480351"
format:
    html:
        toc: true
        theme: solar
    pdf:
        toc: true
---

## INTRODUCTION
This is an example .qmd for my assignment2.

### Changes from both branches
This section combines the changes made on branches of main and testbranch. The main branch was modified to create a merge conflict and testbranch was modified earlier to demonstrate branch-based changes.

### Simple plot
This section includes a simple plot using the `cars` dataset.
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(cars, aes(x = speed, y = dist)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Speed and Stopping Distance",
    x = "Speed",
    y = "Distance"
  )
```
